3248150.name: White Ash Nightfall - ホワイト アッシュ ナイトフォール -
3248150.description:
White Ash Nightfall is a 2D pixel-art side-scrolling horror adventure set in the town of Forest River, where white ash endlessly falls from the sky.
Players take on the role of Tyler, a protagonist who has lost his memory, and must try to escape the town before dawn.

Key Features:

  • Cinematic Presentation
    Experience flowing animations and environmental effects that create a tense, film-like atmosphere.

  • Story-Driven Exploration
    Engage in conversations with NPCs and investigate ruins to gradually uncover the truth about your past and the town’s dark secrets.

  • Choices of Survival
    The fate of your companions and the ending will change depending on the decisions you make.

  • Encounters with the Unknown
    Face tense battles against mysterious lifeforms known as “Aberrations.”

A night where fear, tension, and faint hope intertwine—step into this story and experience it for yourself.
